section_name: General Authority over Commuter Rail Facilities
text: A district may acquire, construct, develop, own, operate, and maintain intermodal and commuter rail facilities, or intercity or other types of passenger rail services, inside, or connect political subdivisions in, the district.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 5
### Chapter 173. Intermunicipal Commuter Rail Districts
##### § 173.201 — General Authority over Commuter Rail Facilities

A district may acquire, construct, develop, own, operate, and maintain intermodal and commuter rail facilities, or intercity or other types of passenger rail services, inside, or connect political subdivisions in, the district.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 91 (S.B.1303), Sec. 24.005(a), eff. September 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: A district may acquire, construct, develop, own, operate, and maintain intermodal and commuter rail facilities, or intercity or other types of passenger rail services, inside, or connect political subdivisions in, the district.
